text: - MEDIUM [room_list.rs](/Users/pablofernandez/Work/29er/crates/29er-tui/src/ui/room_list.rs:261), [app.rs](/Users/pablofernandez/Work/29er/crates/29er-tui/src/app.rs:519): room selection has split state. Tree navigation mutates `TreeState`; `g/G` and Alt+A use `App.selected_index`, so cursor/global navigation can diverge. Make selected room/path one snapshot-owned fact.
